case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER VS. LUMIR CERNY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CERNY, LUMIR SEE ENCLOSED ATTACHMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2019 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2019. NO APPEARANCES, MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2019 BY JUDGE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. (PER JAN. 25, 2019 COURT ORDER).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.50 - SERVED DEC-01-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CERNY, LUMIR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAR-18-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. FEDERAL LAW PROHIBITS A HEALTH CARE PROVIDER FROM BILLING A MEDICAID PATIENT DIRECTLY FOR THE BALANCE OF A HEALTH CARE BILL NOT COVERED BY MEDICAID. (SEE OLSZEWSKI V. SCRIPPS (2003) 30 CAL.4TH 798, 825.) THE CITY SHALL PROVIDE THIS COURT WITH INFORMATION AND AUTHORITIES TO DEMONSTRATE THAT IT IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER THE BALANCE OF DEFENDANT'S BILL DIRECTLY FROM DEFENDANT NOTWITHSTANDING THE MEDICAL PAYMENTS THAT THE CITY RECEIVED FOR DEFENDANT'S CARE. THE CITY SHALL FILE ITS RESPONSE ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 18, 2019 AND SHALL PROVIDE PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE RESPONSE ON DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT MAY RESPOND ON OR BEFORE MARCH 18, 2019. SUBMISSION OF THIS MATTER IS VACATED UNTIL MARCH 18, 2019. THE COURT DOES NOT ANTICIPATE REQUIRING A FURTHER HEARING AND WILL ISSUE A JUDGMENT OR FURTHER ORDER AFTER MARCH 18.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,176.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CERNY, LUMIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-09-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-14-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER JOANNE ADAMS. DEFENDANT LUMIR CERNY DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROSPECT LIMITATIONS ON ZSFG'S RIGHT TO RECOVER BALANCE OF BILLS CCSF V. LUMIR CERNY (ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF CCSF RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR
